name: Aelia
bio:
Starlight Fairy from the Stellar Realm, Stellar Mentor. She maintains world balance with the Heavenly Scepter and protects/heals with starlight magic.

Role: Group Corrosion
Intro: A Physical AOE-type hero with decent area damage ability and multiple ways to corrode enemies.

skillSlots.name: Bursting Fireball
skillSlots.description: Attacks enemy frontline and midline targets, dealing 80% M.DMG with a 30% chance to apply 1 stack of [Holy Seal].

skillSlots.name: Flamefall Strike
skillSlots.description: Attacks 3 random enemy targets, dealing 111% M.DMG. DMG against [Holy Seal]-affected targets is increased by 30%.
